display.purpose: Portal hero titles and large section headings. Anton is inherently uppercase — do not double-apply text-transform.

headline.purpose: Main content-area section titles (DISPLAY_TITLE token). Direct, slight negative tracking.

body.purpose: General UI prose, descriptions, form helper text. Cap at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: All interface chrome: buttons, form labels, metadata, nav items, section headers. Space Mono only.

shadows.name: modal-drop
shadows.purpose: Modal layer only. Conveys hard Z-separation. Not for cards or panels.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button and interactive state transitions (matching theme.js `transition: all 0.15s`).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Loudmouth Green fill, black text, pill radius. One per flow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #CCFF00; color: #000000; border: none; border-radius: 24px; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Space Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.88; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #CCFF00; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent, Ghost Border stroke, muted text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #a0a0a0; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); border-radius: 24px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: 'Space Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #ffffff; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #CCFF00; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action. Transparent, Alert Red text, faint red border.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: none; color: #E8001C; border: 1px solid rgba(232,0,28,0.35); border-radius: 24px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'Space Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { border-color: rgba(232,0,28,0.7); color: #ff2238; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8001C; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field. Canvas bg, Ghost Border, Space Grotesk.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Space Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px; color: #a0a0a0; line-height: 1; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #ffffff; background: #131313; line-height: 1; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #CCFF00; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #595959; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. Dark Panel bg, Ghost Border, 12px radius, 20px padding.
components.html:
Content Plan
April campaign — 12 posts scheduled
components.css: .ds-card { background: #1e1e1e; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #a0a0a0; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Status and category chip. Pill shape, Space Mono uppercase.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; border-radius: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: 'Space Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.8px; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; background: #2a2a2a; color: #a0a0a0; } .ds-badge-accent { background: #CCFF00; color: #000000; }

components.name: Page Header
components.description: Portal top bar. Canvas bg, Ghost Border bottom, MONO page title.
components.css: .ds-page-header { padding: 16px 44px; background: #131313; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; } .ds-page-title { font-family: 'Space Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; }

narrative.overview:
Loudmouth HQ is a creative studio running at full capacity: organized, loud, aesthetically uncompromising. The visual system is built for agency owners and social media managers who spend their working hours inside this tool — people who are decisive, time-pressured, and would rather hold a strong position than hedge toward a safe one.

The palette is deep dark with one loud accent. The typography is a three-family system: Anton for display moments, Space Grotesk for reading, Space Mono for interface chrome and metadata. The design is flat by default; depth is conveyed through tonal surface layering rather than shadows.

This system rejects enterprise grey (Salesforce, Jira) and the minimalist Swiss tradition. Both fail the same test: they don't take a position. Loudmouth HQ takes a position.
keyCharacteristics: Deep-dark canvas, near-black, no light mode
One accent color (Loudmouth Green #CCFF00) used with restraint — its rarity is the signal
Three-family type system where Space Mono owns all interface chrome
Pill-radius buttons at uniform height; every button group wrapped in BTN_ROW
Flat surfaces with tonal depth; one modal shadow, nothing else
Zero decoration: no gradient fills, no glass effects, no ornament

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Loudmouth Green appears on ≤10% of any given screen. It is not a fill, a text decoration, or a background. It appears on primary buttons, active states, focus rings, and selected indicators — and nowhere else. Its scarcity is its authority.

rules.name: The Tonal Layers Rule
rules.body: Depth is expressed through surface values, not shadows. canvas → surface → surface-raised is the three-step elevation stack. Do not add a fourth layer.

rules.name: The Mono Owns Chrome Rule
rules.body: Any text that is interface structure rather than content — buttons, labels, metadata, nav items, section headers — uses Space Mono. Space Grotesk is for content and reading. The distinction is never negotiable.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Do not add box-shadow to cards, panels, or interactive elements as decoration or hover feedback. If an element needs to feel elevated, use a darker background or a Ghost Border — not a shadow.

dos: Do use the three-font system with strict role separation: Anton for display, Space Grotesk for reading, Space Mono for chrome.
Do express depth through surface tones (canvas → surface → surface-raised), not shadows.
Do keep Loudmouth Green on ≤10% of any given screen: CTAs, active indicators, focus rings only.
Do wrap all button groups in BTN_ROW. Buttons size to content, always.
Do apply the modal shadow (0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)) only on the modal layer.
Do write interface copy that is terse and declarative. Labels are commands, not suggestions.
Do use Ghost Border (rgba(255,255,255,0.14)) as the universal stroke — it works at every surface depth.
donts: Don't use enterprise grey: muted surfaces, cramped type, apology-grey everything. If it looks like Salesforce or Jira, it's wrong.
Don't use minimalist Swiss restraint: invisible typography, joyless white space, timid design choices.
Don't apply box-shadow to cards, panels, or list items as decoration or hover feedback.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. Single solid color, always.
Don't use glassmorphism (blur effects, semi-transparent glass cards) decoratively.
Don't put Loudmouth Green on container backgrounds, body text, or decorative fills.
Don't use flex: 1 on buttons. Buttons size to content.
Don't use white or near-white surfaces. The canvas is dark and stays dark.
